99	      "body": "Created new term **vesicle membrane tethering activity** (GO:7770062) as a child of [GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/term/GO:0140177).\n\n**Definition:** A membrane-membrane adaptor activity that provides the first point of contact and physically bridges the vesicle membrane and its target membrane prior to vesicle docking and fusion.\n\n**References:**\n- `PMID:19887069` — Sztul & Lupashin 2009, *FEBS Lett*, \"Role of vesicle tethering factors in the ER-Golgi membrane traffic\" (as requested)\n- `PMID:19575650` — Yu & Hughson 2010, *Annu Rev Cell Dev Biol*, \"Tethering factors as organizers of intracellular vesicular traffic\" — a broad review covering tethering factors across intracellular trafficking pathways, including the plasma-membrane exocyst and CATCHR-family complexes (Munc13 has a CATCHR/MUN-domain fold and is a key synaptic vesicle tethering factor)\n\nA note on the second reference: you asked for an article that \"also covers synaptic vesicle transport and targeting.\" Yu & Hughson 2010 is a general review that includes synaptic-relevant tethers (exocyst, CATCHR/Munc13) within its broader scope. If you'd prefer a more synapse-focused companion reference, I'd suggest `PMID:23164531` (Hallermann & Silver 2013, *Trends Neurosci*, \"Sustaining rapid vesicular release at active zones: potential roles for vesicle tethering\") or `PMID:22794257` (Südhof 2012, *Neuron*, \"The presynaptic active zone\"). Happy to swap or add — just let me know.\n\nSynonyms added:\n- `vesicle membrane tether activity` (EXACT)\n- `vesicle tethering activity` (EXACT)\n\nPR: geneontology/go-ontology#31895\n\n---\n🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**\n- Model: `claude-opus-4-6`\n- Agent harness: claude-code\n- Triggered by: @raymond91125\n- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/24372402903)",

# Issue #31863: NTR - MF vesicle membrane tethering activity

## Summary

Completed. New term `GO:7770062 vesicle membrane tethering activity` has been created as a child of `GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity`. The parent term's definition has also been extended to include "vesicle" as requested.

## Changes Made

1. **New Term Created**: GO:7770062
   - Name: vesicle membrane tethering activity
   - Namespace: molecular_function
   - Definition: "A membrane-membrane adaptor activity that provides the first point of contact and physically bridges the vesicle membrane and its target membrane prior to vesicle docking and fusion."
   - References: PMID:19575650, PMID:19887069
   - Parent: GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity
   - Synonyms: vesicle membrane tether activity, vesicle tethering activity

2. **Parent Term Updated**: GO:0140177
   - Updated definition to include "vesicle": "The binding activity of a molecule that brings together two membranes, either via membrane lipid binding or by interacting with a membrane protein, to establish or maintain the localization of the protein, protein complex, vesicle or organelle."

Both terms include appropriate metadata (created_by, creation_date, term_tracker_item).

---

Changes committed in PR #<NN>

input.content:
# PR Comments for Issue #31863

## Completion Checklist

- [x] PLAN: Issue analyzed, intent is clear, plan created
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: Ontology validated prior to changes
- [x] RESEARCH: Background research performed (references validated)
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: Relevant terms identified and consulted
- [x] DESIGN-PATTERNS: Design patterns reviewed and followed
- [x] EDITS: Changes made to ontology using standard procedures
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: Appropriate parent-child relationship established
- [x] METADATA: All required metadata fields included
  - created_by: dragon-ai-agent
  - creation_date: 2026-04-13T23:43:55Z
  - term_tracker_item: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31863
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION: PMIDs verified and relevant
  - PMID:19575650 (Yu & Hughson 2010) — broad tethering review
  - PMID:19887069 (Sztul & Lupashin 2009) — ER-Golgi membrane traffic
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: SPARQL-QC checks passed

## Changes Detail

### New Term: GO:7770062 vesicle membrane tethering activity

**Stanza:**
```
[Term]
id: GO:7770062
name: vesicle membrane tethering activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "A membrane-membrane adaptor activity that provides the first point of contact and physically bridges the vesicle membrane and its target membrane prior to vesicle docking and fusion." [PMID:19575650, PMID:19887069]
synonym: "vesicle membrane tether activity" EXACT []
synonym: "vesicle tethering activity" EXACT []
is_a: GO:0140177 ! membrane-membrane adaptor activity
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31863" xsd:anyURI
created_by: dragon-ai-agent
creation_date: 2026-04-13T23:43:55Z
```

**Rationale:**
- Term provides specific GO ID for the membrane tethering activity specific to vesicles
- Definition follows genus-differentia pattern with membrane-membrane adaptor activity as genus
- Includes references to both ER-Golgi vesicle trafficking (PMID:19887069) and broader tethering review covering synaptic vesicle tethering factors (PMID:19575650)
- Synonyms provide alternative naming patterns users may search for

### Updated Term: GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity

**Definition Updated:**
From:
> "The binding activity of a molecule that brings together two membranes, either via membrane lipid binding or by interacting with a membrane protein, to establish or maintain the localization of the protein, protein complex or organelle."

To:
> "The binding activity of a molecule that brings together two membranes, either via membrane lipid binding or by interacting with a membrane protein, to establish or maintain the localization of the protein, protein complex, vesicle or organelle."

**Rationale:**
- Extends parent term's scope to explicitly include vesicles alongside other cellular objects
- Clarifies that membrane-membrane adaptor activity can act on vesicles as a specific class of target
- Makes GO:7770062 a natural child term of this broadened definition

## Validation Notes

- All term metadata conforms to GO curation standards
- Definitions clearly specify relationships following best practices
- References are validated and relevant to the biological context
- No logical conflicts or inconsistencies introduced
- Term placement in molecular_function namespace is correct for activity terms

## Referenced Issues

- Issue #31863: NTR - MF vesicle membrane tethering activity (current)
- Referenced genes/products: pombe uso1, grp1, rud3, sec3, exo70, sec15, drp1/sec39

Summary of what has been accomplished:

2. **Changes already in place**:
   - New term GO:7770062 created with proper definition, references (PMID:19575650, PMID:19887069), synonyms, and metadata
   - Parent term GO:0140177 updated to include "vesicle" in its definition

3. **Documentation created**:
   - ISSUE_COMMENTS.md: Concise summary of changes for the GitHub issue
   - PR_COMMENTS.md: Detailed technical description with full checklist for PR review

The work has already been completed and committed (as shown by git log and the content in HEAD). The ontology is valid and follows all GO curation standards.

Since the instructions said not to commit these comment files and not to push, I'm done with the task.

Completed! The issue #31863 has been fully resolved. Here's what was accomplished:

## Summary

**Issue**: Create new term "vesicle membrane tethering activity" and extend the parent term "membrane-membrane adaptor activity"

**Changes Made**:

1. **New Term Created** - GO:7770062
   - Name: vesicle membrane tethering activity
   - Definition: "A membrane-membrane adaptor activity that provides the first point of contact and physically bridges the vesicle membrane and its target membrane prior to vesicle docking and fusion."
   - References: PMID:19575650 (broad tethering review), PMID:19887069 (ER-Golgi traffic)
   - Parent: GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity
   - Includes proper synonyms and metadata

2. **Parent Term Updated** - GO:0140177
   - Extended definition to include "vesicle" alongside protein, protein complex, and organelle

## Deliverables

✅ **ISSUE_COMMENTS.md** - Created with concise status update
✅ **PR_COMMENTS.md** - Created with detailed technical description and completion checklist

All changes have been committed with proper metadata (created_by, creation_date, term_tracker_item). The ontology follows GO curation standards and is ready for review.
